Co,GL
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'YTD', Division = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP,PC,BusCat, Contract, Amt1,Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP,PC,BusCat, Contract, Amt2, 'ITD' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Division = 'Newline' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TP like '3%' or Co like '3%')
update TransX set Flex4 = Co + '-' + TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'BS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is not NULL and Flex3 is NULL
Update x set x.Flex2 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
Update x set x.Flex2 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,3) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex3 = 'PL' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is not NULL and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'AR', Flex3 = 'AR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '01 GIC QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2001','2002','2003','2200','2999') and TP in ('2001','2002','2003','2200','2999') and PC in ('220CSIC000','221CSIC000','341CSIC000') and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '03 LatAm Synd' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and TP = '3030' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '03 LatAm Synd' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3030' and TP = '2007' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '03 LatAm Synd' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2007','3030') and (Contract like 'LA SYND%' or PC = '1428190817') and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '10 PONTUS LA' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2007','2300','2400') and (Contract like 'LA HIC%' or Contract in ('CBULK10','530','LA-PONT 14') and Flex1 is NULL)
update TransX set Flex1 = '10 PONTUS LA' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and TP = '2300' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '10 PONTUS LA' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400') and TP = '2007' and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '11 PONTUS Can' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400') and TP = '2006' and PC = '4070200195' and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '13 Synd LB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and PC = '3991051101' and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '13 Synd LB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2001','3030') and Contract like 'SYND LB%' and not PC in ('3991050801','5500000000','39910615HO') and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '14 Synd Paris' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2002','3030') and Contract like 'SYND PB%' and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '18 2006 HIC NB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2300' and TP = '2006' and not PC in ('4070200194','4070200195') and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '18 2006 HIC NB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2006','2300') and Contract like 'CB HIC%' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '19 HSC CAD' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2006','2400','2450') and Contract like 'HSC CAD%' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '19 HSC CAD' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP in ('2400','2450') and not PC in ('4070200194','4070200195') and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '19 HSC CAD' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2400','2450') and TP = '2006' and not PC in ('4070200194','4070200195') and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set Flex1 = '26 ST SYND' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3030' and TP = '2008' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '26 ST SYND' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2008','3030') and Contract like 'ST SYND%' and Flex1 is NULL
